user.title: Set up UNiNUS Greenhouse Rollup
user.description: Adapt a legacy device's mutually exclusive switches into a standard Cover with safety interlock and estimated position.

legacy_switch_pair.title: Add legacy dual-switch roll-up
legacy_switch_pair.description: Combine mutually exclusive open and close switches into a Cover with remembered estimated position.

data.name: Name
data.auto_stop_at_travel_end: Turn off both direction switches when travel ends

data_description.auto_stop_at_travel_end: When enabled, a full-open or full-close command from this Cover turns off both the open and close switches after the configured travel time.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure legacy dual-switch roll-up
reconfigure.description: Review or change the name, source switches, travel times, and direction-change safety delay. Saving reloads this roll-up.

data.name: Name
data.auto_stop_at_travel_end: Turn off both direction switches when travel ends

data_description.auto_stop_at_travel_end: When enabled, a full-open or full-close command from this Cover turns off both the open and close switches after the configured travel time.

error.same_switch: Open and close must use different switches.
error.switch_in_use: One of these switches is already used by another roll-up.

abort.already_configured: This switch pair is already configured.
abort.native_cover_no_settings: The native MQTT Cover is managed by the MQTT integration; UNiNUS does not proxy or duplicate its settings.

init.title: Adjust legacy travel and safety settings

data.auto_stop_at_travel_end: Turn off both direction switches when travel ends

data_description.auto_stop_at_travel_end: When enabled, a full-open or full-close command from this Cover turns off both direction switches after the configured travel time. Existing entries default to off to preserve their current behavior.

abort.native_cover_no_settings: A native MQTT Cover has no travel or relay settings managed by UNiNUS.
